name: Retinol
description: A vitamin A derivative that increases cell turnover and stimulates collagen.
scientificSummary: Communicates with skin cells to behave like younger cells and pushes fresh cells to the surface faster.
mechanismOfAction: Communicates with skin cells to behave like younger cells and pushes fresh cells to the surface faster.

seo.title: Retinol - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Retinol in skincare.
